title: Directive Principles & Fundamental Duties
subtitle: Master Part IV & Part IVA of the Indian Constitution for SSC CGL Tier-1 & Tier-2
learningOutcomes: Distinguish between Socialistic, Gandhian, and Liberal-Intellectual DPSP classification
Recall all 11 Fundamental Duties under Article 51A with key numerical sub-clauses
Understand the legal non-justiciable nature and key judicial precedents
whyItMatters: Consistently tested in both Tier-1 and Tier-2. Questions focus heavily on borrowed features, article matching, landmark amendments, and identifying non-justiciable rights vs duties.
